features.evidence: The touchscreen is great, I love the 2-in-1 feature and the 1TB SSD capacity is out of this world Its easy to carry and a great screen size

The battery lasts a long time and the overall quality is amazing Great value for money, excellent battery life, lovely speed, I like the backlight of the keys with also feels nice to the touch and it looks very smooth and professional

It's easy to set up like most laptops and fast in getting that done My only criticisms are the speakers don't sound that great, but it says Dolby Atmos so I'm guessing if you hook it up to some better speakers it would be really good

The price is better than anywhere else I could find Great value for money, excellent battery life, lovely speed, I like the backlight of the keys with also feels nice to the touch and it looks very smooth and professional

Great value for money, excellent battery life, lovely speed, I like the backlight of the keys with also feels nice to the touch and it looks very smooth and professional Good performance and structurally sound

Good performance and structurally sound My only criticisms are the speakers don't sound that great, but it says Dolby Atmos so I'm guessing if you hook it up to some better speakers it would be really good
The touchscreen is great, I love the 2-in-1 feature and the 1TB SSD capacity is out of this world
Great value for money, excellent battery life, lovely speed, I like the backlight of the keys with also feels nice to the touch and it looks very smooth and professional
The battery life is quite good as well and its very easy to set up from my old laptop since I had connected my files to the cloud
Lenovo support is the worst I have ever experienced! My left and right click on my touchpad reversed and the pointer started highlighting and deleting things at random
